title: If sentences: si + present, future
subtitle: Make simple conditions and plans.
duolingoBridge: This is useful for plans, advice, and practical decisions.
overview: Knowledge point 1: after si, use present for a real condition.
Knowledge point 2: the result can use futur simple or aller + infinitive.

sections.title: Real condition map
rows: Si tu viens, je serai content.
If you come, I will be happy.
If it rains, I will stay here.
Si j’ai le temps, je vais appeler.
If I have time, I am going to call.
Si tengo tiempo, voy a llamar.
Si c’est possible, je voudrais changer.
If it is possible, I would like to change.
Si tu veux, on peut partir.
If you want, we can leave.
Si ça ne marche pas, dites-moi.
If it does not work, tell me.

items.fr: Si j’ai le temps demain, je vais étudier.
items.en: If I have time tomorrow, I am going to study.
items.es: Si tengo tiempo mañana, voy a estudiar.

items.fr: S’il fait beau, nous irons au parc.
items.en: If the weather is nice, we will go to the park.
items.es: Si hace buen tiempo, iremos al parque.

items.fr: Si tu ne comprends pas, je peux répéter.
items.en: If you do not understand, I can repeat.

items.fr: Si le train est en retard, je t’appellerai.
items.en: If the train is late, I will call you.
items.es: Si el tren llega tarde, te llamaré.

items.fr: Si c’est trop cher, je ne le prendrai pas.
items.en: If it is too expensive, I will not take it.
items.es: Si es demasiado caro, no lo tomaré.
